name: Tyorpitta (Cheese Pitta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the feta cheese into very small pieces.
2. Melt butter in a small pot.
3. Add flour and stir well to form a paste.
4. Slowly add the scalded milk, stirring constantly to make a smooth bechamel sauce.
5. Add a little salt and pepper. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Add the crumbled cheese and mix well.
7. Add eggs and mix again.
8. Butter a pan about 2 inches smaller than the phyllo sheets.
9. Use more than half of the phyllo sheets to make the bottom layer of the pie. Brush each sheet with melted butter and place them in the pan, letting the edges hang over the pan.
10. Pour the cheese-egg mixture evenly into the layers.
11. Cover the mixture with phyllo that extends beyond the pan. This will prevent leakage during baking.
12. Carefully cut remaining phyllo to fit the pan. Brush each sheet with butter before placing on top of the pie.
13. Brush the top with butter and sprinkle a little water.
14. Score the pastry into strips to make cutting the pie easier after it is baked.
15. Bake in a preheated 300°F oven for 45 minutes.
16. Cut into pieces and serve hot.
